page: Amazon Web Services r8i.96xlarge is a memory-optimized server powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features 384 vCPUs and 192 physical cores on an x86_64 architecture using Intel Xeon 6975P-C processors running at 3.9 GHz. The system is equipped with 3072.0 GB of DDR5 memory running at 7 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. It lacks local storage and dedicated GPUs, but includes a 100 Gbps baseline network interface.

Benchmark results place this instance in the top tier for multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth, with uncached read memory bandwidth reaching 1125.32 GB/sec. The processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel AMX for accelerated matrix operations. Database operations and Redis SET performance are highly competitive, with Redis operations exceeding 508 million operations per second.

While the server excels at memory-intensive tasks and prompt processing for large language models, its text generation speeds are moderate due to the absence of dedicated GPU hardware. The high resource density of DDR5 memory and massive core count offer qualitative cost efficiency for large-scale enterprise workloads. It is highly suited for in-memory databases, large-scale data analytics, enterprise-grade virtualization, and high-throughput web serving.
description: Amazon Web Services r8i.96xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 384 vCPUs and 192 physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 6975P-C processors at 3.9 GHz. Built on the Nitro hypervisor, it delivers 3072.0 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory but does not include local storage or GPUs. The server excels in memory-intensive benchmarks, achieving top-tier multi-core CPU performance, exceptional memory bandwidth, and high-throughput database operations. Advanced instruction sets like Intel AMX and AVX-512 are fully supported. While prompt processing for language models is strong, text generation is limited by the lack of GPU acceleration. This instance is designed for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and intensive data processing workloads.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8i.96xlarge is a memory-optimized server with 384 vCPUs, 3072 GB of DDR5 RAM, and 100 Gbps networking, designed for high-throughput database and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r8i.96xlarge is a memory-optimized server featuring 384 vCPUs, 3072 GB of DDR5 RAM, and 100 Gbps network bandwidth.
tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized platform featuring three terabytes of DDR5 RAM and advanced matrix extensions for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 384 vCPUs and 192 physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 6975P-C processors
3072 GB of high-speed DDR5 memory with top-tier bandwidth performance
100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated mathematical operations
Optimized for in-memory databases, Redis deployments, and enterprise applications
